scripts.lint: find public -name '*.js' -type f -exec node --check {} \; && find tests -name '*.mjs' -type f -exec node --check {} \;
scripts.build: node --input-type=module -e "import { accessSync } from 'node:fs'; ['public/index.html','public/mission-control.html','public/dashboard.js','public/mission-control.js'].forEach((file) => accessSync(file)); console.log('Frontend static assets verified.');"
